name: Best Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and crushed bananas to the mixture. Mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, mixing until just combined.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Grease and flour a loaf pan.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 60 minutes.
9. Allow the bread to cool before serving. It keeps well when refrigerated.
Note: To make an egg-free version, increase the amount of baking powder by 1 teaspoon for each egg omitted.
